title: steel_myfirstmod
description: Add a new material, a new set of tools, a new set of armor, and other interesting things to the original Minecraft version
body:
A material steel with properties between diamond and iron, made from any charcoal and coarse iron or iron ingots. Can make armor and tools, among which armor can be upgraded with gold ingots
Add two types of food based on monster drops
Add a profession for villagers: banker, who can exchange various practical general equivalents for emeralds, and you can also exchange emeralds for general equivalents, but of course he has to earn some price difference
If there are further updates, more practical features will be added
